_comment: Single source of truth for the finance pipeline. searchName is the EXACT string the portal expects (Last, First for Harris County; split last/first for Houston). Judges who file locally (JP, County Courts at Law, Probate) are under harrisCounty. State district court judges file with the TEC, not the county — they go under tec. Run `npm run finance-fetch -- --discover` to find judge filers in the county portal and append them to harrisCounty after review.

_harrisCountyDiscovery._comment: Office-title search terms for --discover mode. Finds judge filers in the county portal (County Criminal Courts at Law 1-16, County Civil Courts at Law 1-4, Probate Courts 1-5). Discovered filers land in data/finance-roster-discovered.json for review — verify each name, then move into harrisCounty above.

_tecNote: State legislators AND state district court judges file with the TEC. The tec list below feeds the existing /api/finance/tec route at merge time. District judges should be added here once their TEC filer IDs are confirmed via --discover-tec (searches TEC by office).

tec.name: Letitia Plummer
tec.note: Won D runoff 57,893-55,395 over Annise Parker. Nov 2026 general.

tec.name: Orlando Sanchez
tec.note: Won R runoff 85,304-49,367 over Warren Howell. Nov 2026 general.

tec.name: Paul Bettencourt
tec.note: SD-7 not up in 2026 (elected 2024). Active filer.

tec.name: Harold Dutton Jr.
tec.note: Seeking reelection.

tec.name: Jon Rosenthal
tec.note: Key competitive seat — one of most-watched HD races in Harris County.

tec.name: Abbie Kamin
tec.note: Open seat. Won D primary. Files at TEC (county attorney is a state-law filer).

tec.name: Charles Cunningham
tec.note: Incumbent. Kingwood/Atascocita area. Succeeded Dan Huberty 2023.

tec.name: Briscoe Cain
tec.note: Incumbent. Deer Park/La Porte/East Pasadena.

tec.name: Mano DeAyala
tec.note: Incumbent. Memorial/Briargrove/West Houston.

tec.name: Mark Dorazio
tec.note: Incumbent since 2023. Katy/Cinco Ranch/far west Harris County.

tec.name: A'Yonna Kellum
tec.note: Won March 2026 D primary.

tec.name: Darlene Breaux
tec.note: Won May 2026 D runoff over incumbent Hubert Vo (1,623-1,053).

tec.name: Shannon Dicely
tec.note: Won March 2026 D primary. SD-11 open seat — Middleton ran for AG.

tec.name: Stefanie Bord
tec.note: Won March 2026 D primary. HD-126 open seat — Sam Harless did not run.

tec.name: Stan Stanart
tec.note: Won May 2026 R runoff. HD-126 open seat.

tec.name: Staci Childs
tec.note: Won May 2026 D runoff over Lawrence Allen Jr. HD-131 open seat — Alma Allen retired.

tec.name: Dan Patrick
tec.note: Seeking 3rd term. Statewide race.

tec.name: Glenn Hegar
tec.note: Seeking 3rd term. Statewide race.

tec.name: Gina Hinojosa
tec.note: Former State Rep HD-49 (Austin). Won 2026 D gubernatorial primary.

tec.name: Brandon Creighton
tec.note: Seeking reelection. SD-4 covers NW Harris County + Montgomery + Galveston counties.

tec.name: Borris Miles
tec.note: Seeking reelection. SD-13 covers Third Ward, Sunnyside, SE Houston.

tec.name: Joan Huffman
tec.note: Seeking reelection. SD-17 covers Bellaire, Pearland, SW Houston suburbs.

tec.name: Lois Kolkhorst
tec.note: Seeking reelection. SD-18 touches far NW Harris County (Cypress/Katy area).

fec.name: Jasmine Crockett
fec.office: U.S. Senate (lost D runoff to Talarico)
fec.note: Won March 2026 D primary but lost the May runoff to James Talarico.

fec.name: Ken Paxton
fec.note: Won May 2026 R runoff over Cornyn 93,872-52,041 in Harris County.

fec.name: James Talarico
fec.note: Won May 2026 D runoff over Crockett. General Nov 2026 vs. Paxton.
